expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Deliver persistent notification center with read-state controls and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist per-user notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state stored per account so that read and unread changes persist across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Database stores per-user notification read state with notification id and updated timestamp",
        "Read state defaults to unread when no record exists",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/20260618_notification_read_state.sql",
        "src/server/notifications/notification-read-state.repository.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend query for notification list and unread count",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification feed data including unread count so that the UI can render notification list and unread badge accurately.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification query returns notifications with read state for current user",
        "Response includes unread count derived from persisted read state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/list-notifications.service.ts",
        "src/server/notifications/notifications.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend action to mark notification read or unread",
      "description": "As a user, I want to toggle notification read state so that I can manage which items still need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Endpoint accepts notification id and read boolean for current user",
        "Read-state updates persist and return updated unread count",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/update-notification-read-state.service.ts",
        "src/server/notifications/notifications.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge and open notification list UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want unread badge and notification list panel so that I can discover and review new notifications quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Navigation header shows unread badge count from notification query",
        "Clicking notification trigger opens notification list panel with items sorted newest first",
        "List rows display read or unread visual state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-badge.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-center-panel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add notification list filter by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread items or review completed ones.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification panel includes filter options All, Unread, and Read",
        "Selecting filter updates visible rows without closing panel",
        "Filter interactions keep unread badge count consistent with backend state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-filters.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-list.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add backend action to clear all read notifications for user",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications from my list so that old completed items stop cluttering notification center.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Endpoint removes or archives read notifications for current user only",
        "Unread notifications remain available after clear action",
        "Response returns refreshed unread count and remaining notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/clear-read-notifications.service.ts",
        "src/server/notifications/notifications.routes.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add clear-read control to notification center UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want clear-read control in notification panel so that I can remove read notifications from visible list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification panel shows Clear read action when read notifications exist",
        "Clicking Clear read calls backend clear-read action and refreshes list state",
        "After clear action, read notifications are removed from visible list and badge count updates",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-center-actions.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/notification-center-panel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
